items.title: Tentative two-week ceasefire announced by President Trump and Iran
items.summary: President Trump and Iran announced a tentative two-week ceasefire mid-week, conditional on Iran immediately opening the Strait of Hormuz. The truce is fragile amid ongoing Israel-Hezbollah fire and uncertainty over its scope.
items.domain_relevance: De-escalation signal in Iran-US tensions with Strait of Hormuz stakes
